troparion: (Tone 8) You are praised with our hymns, O Christ our God;* for You shake the earth and its foundations* to convert and save its inhabitants;* and once again, You make it firm, in You goodness and infinite mercy.* Through the prayers of Mother of God,** have mercy on us.
prokimenon: I will sing to You, O Lord.
I will sing, and I will understand in the unspotted way.
second_prokimenon: O Lord, listen to my prayer
and let my cry for help reach You
Do not hide your face from me.
